message:
chore(gitignore): cover .beads/.write.lock and .beads/.sync.lock

After beads_rust 3a40ad0 landed the shared write-lock lifecycle on the
MCP server side, any mutating `br` operation or `br serve` session
acquires .beads/.write.lock and .beads/.sync.lock for the duration of
the call. These flocks are purely runtime coordination state — they
have no meaning to commit and should never reach origin.

Existing .beads/.bv.lock line only covered the bv advisory lock. Add
both new lock files explicitly (rather than a glob) so the intent is
clear and a future reader knows exactly which locks are runtime-only.

files.patch:
@@ -45,6 +45,8 @@ storage.sqlite3-*
 # beads local state
 .beads/.br_history/
 .beads/.bv.lock
+.beads/.write.lock
+.beads/.sync.lock
 
 # Temporary/backup files
 *.bak
